title: SEARCH 2 — Sara reads PETUNIAS plant marker
prompt: Medium close-up in @backyard-kitchen. @Sara on the LEFT crouches next to a small wooden plant marker stuck in the soil that reads "PETUNIAS" in friendly hand-written letters. Sara traces each letter with a finger, sounding them out slowly and proudly: "P… E… T… U… N… I… A… S. PETUNIAS!" @Eva on the RIGHT leans in over the shoulder watching, big smile. Soft warm afternoon light.
